title: zephyranthes microcarpa
intro: Zephyranthes microcarpa, also known as the white rain lily or zephyr lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Zephyranthes microcarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by using its flowers, roots, or leaves, which can be dried or infused in water to create teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
